# Tailwind CSS v4 Documentation

@doc-version: v4.2
@doc-source: https://tailwindcss.com/docs
@note: Tailwind v4 uses CSS-first configuration. Use @theme, @utility, @custom-variant in CSS instead of tailwind.config.js

---
title: Overview
description: Tailwind CSS is a utility-first CSS framework. It scans your source files for class names, generates corresponding styles, and writes them to a static CSS file. Fast, flexible, zero-runtime.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Tailwind CSS v4

Tailwind CSS works by scanning all of your HTML files, JavaScript components, and templates for class names, generating the corresponding styles and writing them to a static CSS file.

## Installation (Vite)

```bash
npm install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite
```

```ts
// vite.config.ts
import tailwindcss from '@tailwindcss/vite'
export default defineConfig({ plugins: [tailwindcss()] })
```

```css
/* app.css */
@import "tailwindcss";
```

## Installation (PostCSS)

```bash
npm install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/postcss postcss
```

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
```

---
title: Styling with utility classes
description: Building complex components from a constrained set of primitive utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs/styling-with-utility-classes"
---

# Styling with utility classes

## Overview

Style elements by combining single-purpose utility classes directly in markup:

```html
<div class="mx-auto flex max-w-sm items-center gap-x-4 rounded-xl bg-white p-6 shadow-lg">
  <img class="size-12 shrink-0" src="/logo.svg" alt="Logo" />
  <div>
    <div class="text-xl font-medium text-black">Title</div>
    <p class="text-gray-500">Description</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Key benefits

- CSS stops growing — utility classes are reusable
- Code is portable — structure and styling live together
- Easier maintenance — change classes directly, no hunting through CSS
- Safer changes — utilities only affect the element they're on
- Faster development — no class naming, no context switching

## Why not inline styles?

- Media queries — Tailwind's responsive variants (sm:, md:, lg:)
- Hover, focus, states — state variants (hover:, focus:, active:)
- Design constraints — predefined design tokens from theme

## Variants

Prefix any utility with a variant to apply conditionally:

- `hover:bg-sky-700` — on hover
- `md:flex` — at medium breakpoint and up
- `dark:bg-gray-800` — in dark mode
- `disabled:opacity-50` — when disabled

Stack variants: `dark:md:hover:bg-indigo-600`

## Arbitrary values

Use square brackets for one-off values:

```html
<div class="bg-[#316ff6] text-[22px] top-[117px]"></div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-[24rem_2.5rem_minmax(0,1fr)]"></div>
<div class="max-h-[calc(100dvh-(--spacing(6)))]"></div>
<div class="[--gutter-width:1rem] lg:[--gutter-width:2rem]"></div>
```

CSS variable shorthand: `fill-(--my-brand-color)` = `fill-[var(--my-brand-color)]`

## Arbitrary properties

```html
<div class="[mask-type:luminance] hover:[mask-type:alpha]"></div>
```

## Managing duplication

- Use loops — render repeated elements from data
- Multi-cursor editing — edit multiple elements at once
- Components — extract reusable UI into components
- Custom CSS — @layer components for btn-primary etc.

## Managing conflicts

- Later class wins — `grid flex` → grid wins
- Important modifier — `bg-red-500!` for !important
- Important flag — `@import "tailwindcss" important;`
- Prefix — `@import "tailwindcss" prefix(tw);` → tw:text-red-500

---
title: Hover, focus, and other states
description: Using variants to style elements on hover, focus, and more.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs/hover-focus-and-other-states"
---

# Hover, focus, and other states

## Pseudo-classes

| Variant | Targets |
|---------|---------|
| hover | :hover |
| focus | :focus |
| focus-within | :focus-within |
| focus-visible | :focus-visible |
| active | :active |
| visited | :visited |
| disabled | :disabled |
| required | :required |
| invalid | :invalid |
| read-only | :read-only |
| checked | :checked |
| indeterminate | :indeterminate |
| first | :first-child |
| last | :last-child |
| only | :only-child |
| odd | :nth-child(odd) |
| even | :nth-child(even) |
| first-of-type | :first-of-type |
| last-of-type | :last-of-type |
| only-of-type | :only-of-type |
| empty | :empty |
| nth-3 | :nth-child(3) |
| nth-last-5 | :nth-last-child(5) |
| nth-of-type-4 | :nth-of-type(4) |
| nth-last-of-type-6 | :nth-last-of-type(6) |
| has-* | :has() — e.g. has-[:focus], has-[img] |
| not-* | :not() — e.g. not-focus:, not-supports-[display:grid]: |

## Parent/sibling state

- `group` + `group-hover:`, `group-focus:`, `group-active:` — style based on parent
- `group/{name}` + `group-hover/{name}:` — named groups for nesting
- `peer` + `peer-invalid:`, `peer-checked:`, `peer-disabled:` — style based on previous sibling
- `peer/{name}` + `peer-checked/{name}:` — named peers
- `in-*` — responds to any parent (in-focus:, in-hover:)

## Pseudo-elements

| Variant | Targets |
|---------|---------|
| before | ::before |
| after | ::after |
| placeholder | ::placeholder |
| file | ::file-selector-button |
| marker | ::marker |
| selection | ::selection |
| first-letter | ::first-letter |
| first-line | ::first-line |

## Attribute selectors

- `[dir="rtl"]`, `[dir="ltr"]`
- `[open]` — open state
- `[aria-*]` — ARIA attributes

## Media/feature queries

- `dark` — prefers-color-scheme: dark
- `portrait`, `landscape`
- `motion-reduce`, `motion-safe`
- `contrast-more`, `contrast-less`
- `forced-colors`
- `supports-[...]` — e.g. supports-[display:grid]

---
title: Responsive design
description: Using breakpoint variants to build adaptive interfaces.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs/responsive-design"
---

# Responsive design

## Breakpoints (mobile-first)

| Prefix | Min width | CSS |
|--------|-----------|-----|
| (none) | all | default |
| sm | 40rem (640px) | @media (width >= 40rem) |
| md | 48rem (768px) | @media (width >= 48rem) |
| lg | 64rem (1024px) | @media (width >= 64rem) |
| xl | 80rem (1280px) | @media (width >= 80rem) |
| 2xl | 96rem (1536px) | @media (width >= 96rem) |

## Max-width variants

| Variant | Media query |
|---------|-------------|
| max-sm | width < 40rem |
| max-md | width < 48rem |
| max-lg | width < 64rem |
| max-xl | width < 80rem |
| max-2xl | width < 96rem |

## Targeting ranges

- `md:max-xl:flex` — between md and xl
- `md:max-lg:flex` — only at md breakpoint

## Custom breakpoints

```css
@theme {
  --breakpoint-xs: 30rem;
  --breakpoint-3xl: 120rem;
}
```

## Arbitrary breakpoints

```html
<div class="max-[600px]:bg-sky-300 min-[320px]:text-center"></div>
```

## Container queries

- `@container` — mark element as container
- `@sm`, `@md`, `@lg` — container size variants (mobile-first)
- `@max-sm`, `@max-md` — max container size
- `@container/{name}` + `@sm/{name}:` — named containers
- `@min-[475px]`, `@max-[960px]` — arbitrary container sizes

Container sizes: @3xs (16rem) through @7xl (80rem)

---
title: Dark mode
description: Using the dark variant to style for dark mode.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs/dark-mode"
---

# Dark mode

## Default

Uses `prefers-color-scheme: dark` media query.

```html
<div class="bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-900 dark:text-white"></div>
```

## Manual toggle (class)

```css
@custom-variant dark (&:where(.dark, .dark *));
```

```html
<html class="dark">
  <div class="bg-white dark:bg-black">...</div>
</html>
```

## Manual toggle (data attribute)

```css
@custom-variant dark (&:where([data-theme=dark], [data-theme=dark] *));
```

```html
<html data-theme="dark">...</html>
```

## Three-way toggle (light/dark/system)

```js
document.documentElement.classList.toggle(
  "dark",
  localStorage.theme === "dark" ||
    (!("theme" in localStorage) && window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: dark)").matches)
);
```

---
title: Theme variables
description: Design tokens and customizing the theme.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs/theme"
---

# Theme variables

## @theme directive

Define design tokens that generate utility classes:

```css
@import "tailwindcss";

@theme {
  --color-mint-500: oklch(0.72 0.11 178);
  --font-display: "Satoshi", "sans-serif";
  --breakpoint-3xl: 120rem;
  --radius-xl: 0.75rem;
}
```

## Theme variable namespaces

| Namespace | Utilities |
|-----------|-----------|
| --color-* | bg-*, text-*, border-*, fill-*, stroke-*, etc. |
| --font-* | font-sans, font-serif, font-mono |
| --text-* | text-xs, text-sm, text-base, text-lg, etc. |
| --font-weight-* | font-thin, font-normal, font-bold, etc. |
| --tracking-* | tracking-tight, tracking-wide, etc. |
| --leading-* | leading-tight, leading-relaxed, etc. |
| --breakpoint-* | sm:*, md:*, lg:*, etc. |
| --container-* | @sm:*, @md:*, max-w-*, etc. |
| --spacing-* | p-*, m-*, gap-*, w-*, h-*, etc. |
| --radius-* | rounded-sm, rounded-lg, etc. |
| --shadow-* | shadow-sm, shadow-lg, etc. |
| --inset-shadow-* | inset-shadow-xs, etc. |
| --drop-shadow-* | drop-shadow-md, etc. |
| --blur-* | blur-sm, blur-lg, etc. |
| --perspective-* | perspective-near, etc. |
| --aspect-* | aspect-video, aspect-square, etc. |
| --ease-* | ease-in, ease-out, ease-in-out |
| --animate-* | animate-spin, animate-pulse, etc. |

## Customizing theme

Extend: Add new variables in @theme
Override: Redefine variable in @theme
Replace namespace: `--color-*: initial;` then define new colors
Custom theme: `--*: initial;` then define all from scratch

## Using theme variables in CSS

```css
.my-element {
  color: var(--color-gray-700);
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  padding: --spacing(4);
}
```

## Functions

- `--spacing(n)` — calc(var(--spacing) * n)
- `--alpha(color / opacity)` — color-mix for opacity

---
title: Adding custom styles
description: Arbitrary values, custom CSS, utilities, variants.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs/adding-custom-styles"
---

# Adding custom styles

## Arbitrary values

```html
<div class="top-[117px] bg-[#bada55] text-[22px] before:content-['Festivus']"></div>
<div class="fill-(--my-brand-color)"></div>
```

## Arbitrary variants

```html
<li class="lg:[&:nth-child(-n+3)]:hover:underline">item</li>
```

## Handling whitespace

Use underscore `_` for spaces: `grid-cols-[1fr_500px_2fr]`
Escape underscore: `before:content-['hello\_world']`

## Resolving ambiguities

```html
<div class="text-(length:--my-var)"></div>  <!-- font-size -->
<div class="text-(color:--my-var)"></div>   <!-- color -->
```

## Custom CSS layers

```css
@layer base {
  h1 { font-size: var(--text-2xl); }
}

@layer components {
  .card {
    background-color: var(--color-white);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    padding: --spacing(6);
  }
}
```

## @variant in custom CSS

```css
.my-element {
  background: white;
  @variant dark { background: black; }
  @variant dark {
    @variant hover { background: gray; }
  }
}
```

## Custom utilities

```css
@utility content-auto {
  content-visibility: auto;
}

@utility scrollbar-hidden {
  &::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
}

@utility tab-* {
  tab-size: --value(--tab-size-*);
}
```

## Custom variants

```css
@custom-variant theme-midnight (&:where([data-theme="midnight"] *));
```

---
title: Detecting classes in source files
description: How Tailwind scans and generates CSS.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs/detecting-classes-in-source-files"
---

# Detecting classes in source files

## How it works

Tailwind scans source files as plain text for tokens that look like class names, then generates CSS only for classes that exist.

## Dynamic class names — DON'T

```html
<!-- BAD: Tailwind won't detect text-red-600 or text-green-600 -->
<div class="text-{{ error ? 'red' : 'green' }}-600"></div>
```

## Dynamic class names — DO

```html
<!-- GOOD: Use complete class names -->
<div class="{{ error ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-green-600' }}"></div>
```

```jsx
// GOOD: Map props to complete class names
const colorVariants = {
  blue: "bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500",
  red: "bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500",
};
return <button className={colorVariants[color]}>...</button>;
```

## @source directive

```css
@source "../node_modules/@acmecorp/ui-lib";
@source not "../src/components/legacy";
@import "tailwindcss" source("../src");
@import "tailwindcss" source(none);
```

## Safelisting

```css
@source inline("underline");
@source inline("{hover:,focus:,}underline");
@source inline("{hover:,}bg-red-{50,{100..900..100},950}");
@source not inline("{hover:,focus:,}bg-red-{50,{100..900..100},950}");
```

---
title: Functions and directives
description: Tailwind CSS directives and functions reference.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs/functions-and-directives"
---

# Functions and directives

## Directives

| Directive | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| @import | Import CSS including tailwindcss |
| @theme | Define design tokens |
| @source | Register source paths for scanning |
| @utility | Add custom utilities |
| @variant | Apply variant in custom CSS |
| @custom-variant | Add custom variants |
| @apply | Inline utility classes in custom CSS |
| @reference | Import for @apply/@variant without duplicating output |
| @config | Load legacy tailwind.config.js (v3 compat) |
| @plugin | Load legacy plugins (v3 compat) |

## Functions

| Function | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| --spacing(n) | calc(var(--spacing) * n) |
| --alpha(color / pct) | color-mix for opacity |
| theme() | Deprecated — use var(--*) instead |

## Layers

```css
@layer theme, base, components, utilities;
```

---
title: Utility reference — Layout
description: All Tailwind v4 layout utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Layout utilities

## Display
inline, block, inline-block, flow-root, flex, inline-flex, grid, inline-grid, contents, table, table-caption, table-cell, table-column, table-column-group, table-footer-group, table-header-group, table-row, table-row-group, hidden, sr-only, not-sr-only

## Aspect ratio
aspect-auto, aspect-square, aspect-video, aspect-4/3, aspect-3/2, aspect-16/9, aspect-3/4, aspect-2/3, aspect-9/16

## Columns
columns-1, columns-2, columns-3, columns-4, columns-5, columns-6, columns-7, columns-8, columns-9, columns-auto, columns-3xs, columns-2xs, columns-xs, columns-sm, columns-md, columns-lg, columns-xl, columns-2xl, columns-3xl

## Break
break-after-auto, break-before-auto, break-inside-auto, break-after-avoid, break-before-avoid, break-inside-avoid, break-after-all, break-before-all, break-inside-avoid-page, break-after-page, break-before-page, break-inside-avoid-column, break-after-column, break-before-column

## Box
box-border, box-content, box-decoration-slice, box-decoration-clone

## Float & clear
float-start, float-end, float-right, float-left, float-none, clear-start, clear-end, clear-left, clear-right, clear-both, clear-none

## Isolation
isolate, isolate-auto

## Object fit & position
object-contain, object-cover, object-fill, object-none, object-scale-down, object-bottom, object-center, object-left, object-left-bottom, object-left-top, object-right, object-right-bottom, object-right-top, object-top

## Overflow
overflow-auto, overflow-hidden, overflow-clip, overflow-visible, overflow-scroll, overflow-x-auto, overflow-y-auto, overflow-x-hidden, overflow-y-hidden, overflow-x-clip, overflow-y-clip, overflow-x-visible, overflow-y-visible, overflow-x-scroll, overflow-y-scroll

## Overscroll
overscroll-auto, overscroll-contain, overscroll-none, overscroll-x-auto, overscroll-y-auto, overscroll-x-contain, overscroll-y-contain, overscroll-x-none, overscroll-y-none

## Position
static, fixed, absolute, relative, sticky

## Inset (top, right, bottom, left)
inset-0, inset-x-0, inset-y-0, inset-px, inset-auto, top-0, right-0, bottom-0, left-0, top-auto, right-auto, bottom-auto, left-auto

## Visibility
visible, invisible, collapse

## Z-index
z-0, z-10, z-20, z-30, z-40, z-50, z-auto

---
title: Utility reference — Flexbox & Grid
description: All Tailwind v4 flexbox and grid utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Flexbox & Grid utilities

## Flex basis
basis-0, basis-1, basis-2, basis-3, basis-4, basis-5, basis-6, basis-7, basis-8, basis-9, basis-10, basis-11, basis-12, basis-14, basis-16, basis-20, basis-24, basis-28, basis-32, basis-36, basis-40, basis-44, basis-48, basis-52, basis-56, basis-60, basis-64, basis-72, basis-80, basis-96, basis-auto, basis-px, basis-0.5, basis-1.5, basis-2.5, basis-3.5, basis-1/2, basis-1/3, basis-2/3, basis-1/4, basis-2/4, basis-3/4, basis-1/5, basis-2/5, basis-3/5, basis-4/5, basis-1/6, basis-2/6, basis-3/6, basis-4/6, basis-5/6, basis-1/12, basis-2/12, basis-3/12, basis-4/12, basis-5/12, basis-6/12, basis-7/12, basis-8/12, basis-9/12, basis-10/12, basis-11/12, basis-full

## Flex direction
flex-row, flex-row-reverse, flex-col, flex-col-reverse

## Flex wrap
flex-wrap, flex-wrap-reverse, flex-nowrap

## Flex
flex-1, flex-auto, flex-initial, flex-none

## Flex grow
grow, grow-0

## Flex shrink
shrink, shrink-0

## Order
order-1, order-2, order-3, order-4, order-5, order-6, order-7, order-8, order-9, order-10, order-11, order-12, order-first, order-last, order-none

## Grid template columns
grid-cols-1, grid-cols-2, grid-cols-3, grid-cols-4, grid-cols-5, grid-cols-6, grid-cols-7, grid-cols-8, grid-cols-9, grid-cols-10, grid-cols-11, grid-cols-12, grid-cols-none, grid-cols-subgrid, grid-cols-[...]

## Grid column
col-auto, col-span-1, col-span-2, col-span-3, col-span-4, col-span-5, col-span-6, col-span-7, col-span-8, col-span-9, col-span-10, col-span-11, col-span-12, col-span-full, col-start-1, col-start-2, col-start-auto, col-end-1, col-end-2, col-end-auto

## Grid template rows
grid-rows-1, grid-rows-2, grid-rows-3, grid-rows-4, grid-rows-5, grid-rows-6, grid-rows-none, grid-rows-subgrid

## Grid row
row-auto, row-span-1, row-span-2, row-span-3, row-span-4, row-span-5, row-span-6, row-span-full, row-start-1, row-start-auto, row-end-1, row-end-auto

## Grid auto flow
grid-flow-row, grid-flow-col, grid-flow-dense, grid-flow-row-dense, grid-flow-col-dense

## Grid auto columns/rows
auto-cols-auto, auto-cols-min, auto-cols-max, auto-cols-fr, auto-rows-auto, auto-rows-min, auto-rows-max, auto-rows-fr

## Gap
gap-0, gap-1, gap-2, gap-3, gap-4, gap-5, gap-6, gap-7, gap-8, gap-9, gap-10, gap-11, gap-12, gap-14, gap-16, gap-20, gap-24, gap-28, gap-32, gap-36, gap-40, gap-44, gap-48, gap-52, gap-56, gap-60, gap-64, gap-72, gap-80, gap-96, gap-px, gap-0.5, gap-1.5, gap-2.5, gap-3.5, gap-x-*, gap-y-*

## Justify content
justify-normal, justify-start, justify-end, justify-center, justify-between, justify-around, justify-evenly, justify-stretch

## Justify items
justify-items-start, justify-items-end, justify-items-center, justify-items-stretch, justify-items-baseline

## Justify self
justify-self-auto, justify-self-start, justify-self-end, justify-self-center, justify-self-stretch, justify-self-baseline

## Align content
content-normal, content-center, content-start, content-end, content-between, content-around, content-evenly, content-baseline, content-stretch

## Align items
items-start, items-end, items-center, items-baseline, items-stretch

## Align self
self-auto, self-start, self-end, self-center, self-stretch, self-baseline

## Place content/items/self
place-content-*, place-items-*, place-self-*

---
title: Utility reference — Spacing
description: All Tailwind v4 spacing utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Spacing utilities

## Padding
p-0, p-1, p-2, p-3, p-4, p-5, p-6, p-7, p-8, p-9, p-10, p-11, p-12, p-14, p-16, p-20, p-24, p-28, p-32, p-36, p-40, p-44, p-48, p-52, p-56, p-60, p-64, p-72, p-80, p-96, p-px, p-0.5, p-1.5, p-2.5, p-3.5, px-*, py-*, pt-*, pr-*, pb-*, pl-*, ps-*, pe-*

## Margin
m-0, m-1, m-2, m-3, m-4, m-5, m-6, m-7, m-8, m-9, m-10, m-11, m-12, m-14, m-16, m-20, m-24, m-28, m-32, m-36, m-40, m-44, m-48, m-52, m-56, m-60, m-64, m-72, m-80, m-96, m-px, m-0.5, m-1.5, m-2.5, m-3.5, m-auto, mx-*, my-*, mt-*, mr-*, mb-*, ml-*, ms-*, me-*

Negative: -m-*, -mx-*, -my-*, -mt-*, -mr-*, -mb-*, -ml-*

---
title: Utility reference — Sizing
description: All Tailwind v4 sizing utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Sizing utilities

## Width
w-0, w-1, w-2, w-3, w-4, w-5, w-6, w-7, w-8, w-9, w-10, w-11, w-12, w-14, w-16, w-20, w-24, w-28, w-32, w-36, w-40, w-44, w-48, w-52, w-56, w-60, w-64, w-72, w-80, w-96, w-auto, w-px, w-0.5, w-1.5, w-2.5, w-3.5, w-1/2, w-1/3, w-2/3, w-1/4, w-2/4, w-3/4, w-1/5, w-2/5, w-3/5, w-4/5, w-1/6, w-2/6, w-3/6, w-4/6, w-5/6, w-1/12, w-2/12, w-3/12, w-4/12, w-5/12, w-6/12, w-7/12, w-8/12, w-9/12, w-10/12, w-11/12, w-full, w-screen, w-min, w-max, w-fit, w-svw, w-lvw, w-dvw

## Min/Max width
min-w-0, min-w-full, min-w-min, min-w-max, min-w-fit, max-w-0, max-w-3xs, max-w-2xs, max-w-xs, max-w-sm, max-w-md, max-w-lg, max-w-xl, max-w-2xl, max-w-3xl, max-w-4xl, max-w-5xl, max-w-6xl, max-w-7xl, max-w-full, max-w-min, max-w-max, max-w-fit, max-w-prose, max-w-screen-sm, max-w-screen-md, max-w-screen-lg, max-w-screen-xl, max-w-screen-2xl

## Height
h-0, h-1, h-2, h-3, h-4, h-5, h-6, h-7, h-8, h-9, h-10, h-11, h-12, h-14, h-16, h-20, h-24, h-28, h-32, h-36, h-40, h-44, h-48, h-52, h-56, h-60, h-64, h-72, h-80, h-96, h-auto, h-px, h-0.5, h-1.5, h-2.5, h-3.5, h-1/2, h-1/3, h-2/3, h-1/4, h-2/4, h-3/4, h-1/5, h-2/5, h-3/5, h-4/5, h-1/6, h-2/6, h-3/6, h-4/6, h-5/6, h-full, h-screen, h-min, h-max, h-fit, h-svh, h-lvw, h-dvh

## Min/Max height
min-h-0, min-h-full, min-h-screen, min-h-svh, min-h-lvw, min-h-dvw, min-h-min, min-h-max, min-h-fit, max-h-0, max-h-3xs, max-h-2xs, max-h-xs, max-h-sm, max-h-md, max-h-lg, max-h-xl, max-h-2xl, max-h-3xl, max-h-4xl, max-h-5xl, max-h-6xl, max-h-7xl, max-h-full, max-h-screen, max-h-svh, max-h-lvw, max-h-dvw, max-h-min, max-h-max, max-h-fit

## Size (width + height)
size-0, size-1, size-2, size-3, size-4, size-5, size-6, size-7, size-8, size-9, size-10, size-11, size-12, size-14, size-16, size-20, size-24, size-28, size-32, size-36, size-40, size-44, size-48, size-52, size-56, size-60, size-64, size-72, size-80, size-96, size-auto, size-px, size-0.5, size-1.5, size-2.5, size-3.5, size-1/2, size-1/3, size-2/3, size-1/4, size-2/4, size-3/4, size-full, size-min, size-max, size-fit

## Inline/block size
min-w-*, max-w-*, w-* → inline-size variants: min-inline-size-*, max-inline-size-*, inline-size-*
min-h-*, max-h-*, h-* → block-size variants: min-block-size-*, max-block-size-*, block-size-*

---
title: Utility reference — Typography
description: All Tailwind v4 typography utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Typography utilities

## Font family
font-sans, font-serif, font-mono, font-*

## Font size
text-xs, text-sm, text-base, text-lg, text-xl, text-2xl, text-3xl, text-4xl, text-5xl, text-6xl, text-7xl, text-8xl, text-9xl

Modifier for line-height: text-base/6, text-lg/7, text-xl/8, etc.

## Font smoothing
antialiased, subpixel-antialiased

## Font style
italic, not-italic

## Font weight
font-thin, font-extralight, font-light, font-normal, font-medium, font-semibold, font-bold, font-extrabold, font-black

## Font stretch
font-ultra-condensed, font-extra-condensed, font-condensed, font-semi-condensed, font-normal, font-semi-expanded, font-expanded, font-extra-expanded, font-ultra-expanded

## Letter spacing
tracking-tighter, tracking-tight, tracking-normal, tracking-wide, tracking-wider, tracking-widest

## Line height
leading-none, leading-tight, leading-snug, leading-normal, leading-relaxed, leading-loose, leading-3, leading-4, leading-5, leading-6, leading-7, leading-8, leading-9, leading-10

## Line clamp
line-clamp-1, line-clamp-2, line-clamp-3, line-clamp-none

## List style
list-none, list-disc, list-decimal, list-inside, list-outside

## Text align
text-left, text-center, text-right, text-justify, text-start, text-end

## Text color
text-{color}-{shade}, text-inherit, text-current, text-transparent

## Text decoration
underline, overline, line-through, no-underline, decoration-*, decoration-solid, decoration-double, decoration-dotted, decoration-dashed, decoration-wavy, underline-offset-*

## Text transform
uppercase, lowercase, capitalize, normal-case

## Text overflow
truncate, text-ellipsis, text-clip

## Text wrap
text-wrap, text-nowrap, text-balance, text-pretty

## Text indent
indent-0, indent-1, indent-2, indent-3, indent-4, indent-5, indent-6, indent-7, indent-8, indent-9, indent-10, indent-11, indent-12, indent-px, indent-0.5, indent-1.5, indent-2.5, indent-3.5

## Vertical align
align-baseline, align-top, align-middle, align-bottom, align-text-top, align-text-bottom, align-sub, align-super

## White space
whitespace-normal, whitespace-nowrap, whitespace-pre, whitespace-pre-line, whitespace-pre-wrap, whitespace-break-spaces

## Word break
break-normal, break-words, break-all, break-keep

## Overflow wrap
break-words, break-normal

## Hyphens
hyphens-none, hyphens-manual, hyphens-auto

## Content (pseudo-elements)
content-none, content-['...']

---
title: Utility reference — Backgrounds
description: All Tailwind v4 background utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Background utilities

## Background attachment
bg-fixed, bg-local, bg-scroll

## Background clip
bg-clip-border, bg-clip-padding, bg-clip-content, bg-clip-text

## Background color
bg-{color}-{shade}, bg-inherit, bg-current, bg-transparent

## Background image
bg-none, bg-gradient-to-t, bg-gradient-to-tr, bg-gradient-to-r, bg-gradient-to-br, bg-gradient-to-b, bg-gradient-to-bl, bg-gradient-to-l, bg-gradient-to-tl, bg-gradient-to-b from-* via-* to-*

## Background origin
bg-origin-border, bg-origin-padding, bg-origin-content

## Background position
bg-bottom, bg-center, bg-left, bg-left-bottom, bg-left-top, bg-right, bg-right-bottom, bg-right-top, bg-top

## Background repeat
bg-repeat, bg-no-repeat, bg-repeat-x, bg-repeat-y, bg-repeat-round, bg-repeat-space

## Background size
bg-auto, bg-cover, bg-contain, bg-*

---
title: Utility reference — Borders
description: All Tailwind v4 border utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Border utilities

## Border radius
rounded-none, rounded-sm, rounded, rounded-md, rounded-lg, rounded-xl, rounded-2xl, rounded-3xl, rounded-4xl, rounded-full, rounded-ss-*, rounded-se-*, rounded-ee-*, rounded-es-*, rounded-s-*, rounded-e-*, rounded-t-*, rounded-r-*, rounded-b-*, rounded-l-*, rounded-ss-none, rounded-se-none, etc.

## Border width
border-0, border-2, border-4, border-8, border, border-x-*, border-y-*, border-s-*, border-e-*, border-t-*, border-r-*, border-b-*, border-l-*

## Border color
border-{color}-{shade}, border-inherit, border-current, border-transparent

## Border style
border-solid, border-dashed, border-dotted, border-double, border-hidden, border-none

## Outline
outline-none, outline, outline-0, outline-1, outline-2, outline-4, outline-8, outline-{color}, outline-offset-0, outline-offset-1, outline-offset-2, outline-offset-4, outline-offset-8

title: Utility reference — Effects
description: All Tailwind v4 effect utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Effects utilities

## Box shadow
shadow-2xs, shadow-xs, shadow-sm, shadow-md, shadow-lg, shadow-xl, shadow-2xl, shadow-inner, shadow-none, shadow-{color}

## Text shadow
text-shadow-2xs, text-shadow-xs, text-shadow-sm, text-shadow-md, text-shadow-lg, text-shadow-none

## Opacity
opacity-0, opacity-5, opacity-10, opacity-20, opacity-25, opacity-30, opacity-40, opacity-50, opacity-60, opacity-70, opacity-75, opacity-80, opacity-90, opacity-95, opacity-100

## Mix blend mode
mix-blend-normal, mix-blend-multiply, mix-blend-screen, mix-blend-overlay, mix-blend-darken, mix-blend-lighten, mix-blend-color-dodge, mix-blend-color-burn, mix-blend-hard-light, mix-blend-soft-light, mix-blend-difference, mix-blend-exclusion, mix-blend-hue, mix-blend-saturation, mix-blend-color, mix-blend-luminosity, mix-blend-plus-darker, mix-blend-plus-lighter

## Background blend mode
bg-blend-normal, bg-blend-multiply, bg-blend-screen, bg-blend-overlay, bg-blend-darken, bg-blend-lighten, bg-blend-color-dodge, bg-blend-color-burn, bg-blend-hard-light, bg-blend-soft-light, bg-blend-difference, bg-blend-exclusion, bg-blend-hue, bg-blend-saturation, bg-blend-color, bg-blend-luminosity

## Mask
mask-none, mask-clip-border, mask-clip-padding, mask-clip-content, mask-clip-text, mask-clip-fill-box, mask-clip-stroke-box, mask-clip-view-box, mask-composite-add, mask-composite-subtract, mask-composite-intersect, mask-composite-exclude, mask-mode-match, mask-mode-luminance, mask-mode-alpha, mask-origin-border, mask-origin-padding, mask-origin-content, mask-origin-fill-box, mask-origin-stroke-box, mask-origin-view-box, mask-repeat-repeat, mask-repeat-no-repeat, mask-repeat-repeat-x, mask-repeat-repeat-y, mask-repeat-repeat-space, mask-repeat-repeat-round, mask-position-*, mask-size-auto, mask-size-cover, mask-size-contain, mask-type-luminance, mask-type-alpha

---
title: Utility reference — Filters
description: All Tailwind v4 filter utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Filter utilities

## Filter
blur-none, blur-sm, blur-md, blur-lg, blur-xl, blur-2xl, blur-3xl, blur-px, brightness-0, brightness-50, brightness-75, brightness-90, brightness-95, brightness-100, brightness-105, brightness-110, brightness-125, brightness-150, brightness-200, contrast-0, contrast-50, contrast-75, contrast-100, contrast-125, contrast-150, contrast-200, drop-shadow-2xs, drop-shadow-xs, drop-shadow-sm, drop-shadow-md, drop-shadow-lg, drop-shadow-xl, drop-shadow-2xl, drop-shadow-none, grayscale-0, grayscale, hue-rotate-0, hue-rotate-15, hue-rotate-30, hue-rotate-60, hue-rotate-90, hue-rotate-180, invert-0, invert, saturate-0, saturate-50, saturate-100, saturate-150, saturate-200, sepia-0, sepia

## Backdrop filter
backdrop-blur-none, backdrop-blur-sm, backdrop-blur-md, backdrop-blur-lg, backdrop-blur-xl, backdrop-blur-2xl, backdrop-blur-3xl, backdrop-blur-px, backdrop-brightness-*, backdrop-contrast-*, backdrop-grayscale-0, backdrop-grayscale, backdrop-hue-rotate-*, backdrop-invert-0, backdrop-invert, backdrop-opacity-*, backdrop-saturate-0, backdrop-saturate-50, backdrop-saturate-100, backdrop-saturate-150, backdrop-saturate-200, backdrop-sepia-0, backdrop-sepia

---
title: Utility reference — Transitions & Animation
description: All Tailwind v4 transition and animation utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Transitions & Animation utilities

## Transition property
transition-none, transition-all, transition, transition-colors, transition-opacity, transition-shadow, transition-transform

## Transition duration
duration-0, duration-75, duration-100, duration-150, duration-200, duration-300, duration-500, duration-700, duration-1000

## Transition timing
ease-linear, ease-in, ease-out, ease-in-out, ease-*

## Transition delay
delay-0, delay-75, delay-100, delay-150, delay-200, delay-300, delay-500, delay-700, delay-1000

## Animation
animate-none, animate-spin, animate-ping, animate-pulse, animate-bounce, animate-*

---
title: Utility reference — Transforms
description: All Tailwind v4 transform utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Transform utilities

## Transform
transform, transform-gpu, transform-none

## Transform origin
origin-center, origin-top, origin-top-right, origin-right, origin-bottom-right, origin-bottom, origin-bottom-left, origin-left, origin-top-left

## Scale
scale-0, scale-50, scale-75, scale-90, scale-95, scale-100, scale-105, scale-110, scale-125, scale-150, scale-x-*, scale-y-*

## Rotate
rotate-0, rotate-1, rotate-2, rotate-3, rotate-6, rotate-12, rotate-45, rotate-90, rotate-180, -rotate-180, -rotate-90, -rotate-45, -rotate-12, -rotate-6, -rotate-3, -rotate-2, -rotate-1

## Translate
translate-x-0, translate-x-1, translate-x-2, translate-x-3, translate-x-4, translate-x-5, translate-x-6, translate-x-7, translate-x-8, translate-x-9, translate-x-10, translate-x-11, translate-x-12, translate-x-14, translate-x-16, translate-x-20, translate-x-24, translate-x-28, translate-x-32, translate-x-36, translate-x-40, translate-x-44, translate-x-48, translate-x-52, translate-x-56, translate-x-60, translate-x-64, translate-x-72, translate-x-80, translate-x-96, translate-x-px, translate-x-0.5, translate-x-1.5, translate-x-2.5, translate-x-3.5, translate-x-1/2, translate-x-full, -translate-x-*, translate-y-*, -translate-y-*

## Skew
skew-x-0, skew-x-1, skew-x-2, skew-x-3, skew-x-6, skew-x-12, -skew-x-*, skew-y-*, -skew-y-*

## Perspective
perspective-none, perspective-dramatic, perspective-near, perspective-normal, perspective-midrange, perspective-distant

## Backface visibility
backface-visible, backface-hidden

---
title: Utility reference — Interactivity
description: All Tailwind v4 interactivity utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Interactivity utilities

## Accent color
accent-{color}-{shade}, accent-auto

## Appearance
appearance-none, appearance-auto

## Caret color
caret-{color}-{shade}, caret-inherit, caret-current, caret-transparent

## Color scheme
color-scheme-light, color-scheme-dark, color-scheme-normal

## Cursor
cursor-auto, cursor-default, cursor-pointer, cursor-wait, cursor-text, cursor-move, cursor-help, cursor-not-allowed, cursor-none, cursor-context-menu, cursor-progress, cursor-cell, cursor-crosshair, cursor-vertical-text, cursor-alias, cursor-copy, cursor-no-drop, cursor-grab, cursor-grabbing, cursor-all-scroll, cursor-col-resize, cursor-row-resize, cursor-n-resize, cursor-e-resize, cursor-s-resize, cursor-w-resize, cursor-ne-resize, cursor-nw-resize, cursor-se-resize, cursor-sw-resize, cursor-ew-resize, cursor-ns-resize, cursor-nesw-resize, cursor-nwse-resize, cursor-zoom-in, cursor-zoom-out

## Pointer events
pointer-events-none, pointer-events-auto

## Resize
resize-none, resize-y, resize-x, resize

## Scroll behavior
scroll-auto, scroll-smooth

## Scroll margin/padding
scroll-m-0, scroll-m-1, scroll-m-2, scroll-m-3, scroll-m-4, scroll-m-5, scroll-m-6, scroll-m-7, scroll-m-8, scroll-m-9, scroll-m-10, scroll-m-11, scroll-m-12, scroll-m-14, scroll-m-16, scroll-m-20, scroll-m-24, scroll-m-28, scroll-m-32, scroll-m-36, scroll-m-40, scroll-m-44, scroll-m-48, scroll-m-52, scroll-m-56, scroll-m-60, scroll-m-64, scroll-m-72, scroll-m-80, scroll-m-96, scroll-m-px, scroll-m-0.5, scroll-m-1.5, scroll-m-2.5, scroll-m-3.5, scroll-mx-*, scroll-my-*, scroll-mt-*, scroll-mr-*, scroll-mb-*, scroll-ml-*, scroll-ms-*, scroll-me-*, scroll-p-*, scroll-px-*, scroll-py-*, scroll-pt-*, scroll-pr-*, scroll-pb-*, scroll-pl-*, scroll-ps-*, scroll-pe-*

## Scroll snap
snap-start, snap-end, snap-center, snap-align-none, snap-normal, snap-always, snap-none, snap-x, snap-y, snap-both, snap-mandatory, snap-proximity, snap-none

## Touch action
touch-auto, touch-none, touch-pan-x, touch-pan-left, touch-pan-right, touch-pan-y, touch-pan-up, touch-pan-down, touch-pinch-zoom, touch-manipulation

## User select
select-none, select-text, select-all, select-auto

## Will change
will-change-auto, will-change-scroll, will-change-contents, will-change-transform

---
title: Utility reference — SVG
description: All Tailwind v4 SVG utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# SVG utilities

## Fill
fill-none, fill-{color}-{shade}, fill-inherit, fill-current, fill-transparent

## Stroke
stroke-none, stroke-{color}-{shade}, stroke-inherit, stroke-current, stroke-transparent

## Stroke width
stroke-0, stroke-1, stroke-2

---
title: Utility reference — Accessibility
description: All Tailwind v4 accessibility utilities.
url: "https://tailwindcss.com/docs"
---

# Accessibility utilities

## Forced color adjust
forced-color-adjust-auto, forced-color-adjust-none

## Screen reader
sr-only, not-sr-only
